day7_eval_note: Trained on Kaggle data (safe=15000, jailbreak=609, injection=203). OOD on updated pipeline (jackhhao+SPML sources). Re-run needed with improved data pipeline.
day7_test_note: Day 7 evaluation on updated 2545-row test set: baseline jailbreak_recall=0.4921 indirect_recall=0.5472, stage_a jailbreak_recall=0.5079 indirect_recall=0.3774. Both sub-optimal — trained on stale data. Re-train on Kaggle to get real numbers.
